Chat.title: Chat Session
Chat.description: A symptom analysis chat session between a user and the AI.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the chat.

title.description: A short title for the chat session.

messages.description: The list of messages in the chat.

lastAnalysis.description: The most recent symptom analysis result.

MedicalRecord.title: Medical Record
MedicalRecord.description: A stored medical document or note for a user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the record.

title.description: The title of the medical record.

content.description: The text content of the record.

analysis.description: The AI-generated summary of the record.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: A booked medical consultation with a doctor.

userId.description: The UID of the user who booked the appointment.

time.description: The time slot of the appointment.
